title: OUTPATIENT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: ADOLESCENT CENTER OUTPATIENT BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient substance use disorder treatment and cognitive behavioral therapy. Services include talk therapy, group sessions with family members, and access to both mental health and substance use disorder professionals. 11104 SE Stark Street Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Individuals age 14-17 with substance use issues Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm Email (971) 703-4623 1 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 703-4623 ext 1 Treatment Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or fill out referral form on the website FEES: Accepts most insurance providers, including Medicaid DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Multnomah, Clackamas, and Washington Counties Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment * Adolescents If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ADOLESCENT CENTER
